TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Yuluw ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 44 buwan, 163 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 159 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 91%, Paywan 2%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 10%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Yuluw hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Yuluw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Yuluw hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Yuluw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Yuluw hya' ga Kin lwan. tay 'llaw na Yuluw hya' ga Smangus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ juluw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli **%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na juluw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na juluw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na juluw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na juluw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na juluw ħjaʔ ɣa kin lwan. taj ʔllaw na juluw ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Yuluw ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 44 buwan, 163 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 159 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 91%, Paywan 2%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 10%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Yuluw hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Yuluw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Yuluw hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Yuluw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Yuluw hya' ga Kin lwan. tay 'llaw na Yuluw hya' ga Smangus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ juluw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli **%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na juluw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na juluw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na juluw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na juluw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na juluw ħjaʔ ɣa kin lwan. taj ʔllaw na juluw ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
